case_title: SUE PATEL VS. JUAN CARLOS LEONARDO ET AL

docket_entries.description: EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT LEONARDO, JUAN CARLOS
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, SUE SERVED FEB-12-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LEONARDO, JUAN CARLOS

DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
